rationale: Review 2 uniquely identifies that ReductiveGroup and SemisimpleGroup have only `True` fields (confirmed at diff lines 69, 74), making any AffineAlgGroup trivially satisfy both — the most materially damaging API flaw in the PR; Review 1 notices the vacuous projection theorem but misses that the classes themselves are empty, so acting on Review 1 leaves the hollow typeclasses in place.
